creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
lippe       2009-08-25 01:16:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/mmrecover   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  mmrecover is a data recovery utility intended to save your girlfriend's life
  when she has accidentally deleted all photos of the last holidays of her
  parents to Portugal from the family's computer.
  
  By extension, it can recover any contiguous JPEG file from a raw data device
  image.
  
  PR:             ports/137831
  Submitted by:   Romain Tartiere <romain@blogreen.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1277    +1 -0      ports/graphics/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/graphics/mmrecover/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/graphics/mmrecover/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/graphics/mmrecover/pkg-descr (new)
